## ⚠️ Security Reporting

**For critical vulnerabilities, please DO NOT create a public issue.**
Instead, email the maintainer directly.

## Security Issue Description
A clear description of the security concern.

## Severity
- [ ] Critical - Remote code execution, data breach
- [ ] High - Authentication bypass, privilege escalation
- [ ] Medium - Information disclosure, DoS
- [ ] Low - Minor information leak

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Setup '...'
2. Execute '...'
3. Observe '...'

## Impact
Describe the potential impact if exploited.

## Suggested Fix
If you have ideas on how to fix this issue.
